reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Dos unos usureros. Una lamparita de una luz delantera me la cobraron 8600 pesos. Si señores una lamparita. Y no estoy hablando de laguna luz led. Solo era un foquito. No hay derecho que sean tan chorros.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. They're two loan sharks. They charged me 8,600 pesos for a small bulb in a headlight. Yes, sir, a single bulb. And I'm not talking about some fancy LED light. It was just a tiny bulb. It's outrageous that they're such crooks.

reviewReply.comment:
Le pedimos disculpas ,en el turno tarde no encontramos ninguna venta de ese tipo de producto,  si nos puede ampliar la info o enviar el ticket nos ayudaria bastante, 
Le pasamos nuesta mail autonavisrl@yahoo.com.ar gracias
